project_context.target_audience: Indian Government School Teachers (moderate digital literacy, ages 30-55)
project_context.primary_workflow: Upload, Review, Override, Analyze AI-evaluated answer sheets

design_principles.clarity_first: One primary action per screen. No hidden hover interactions.
design_principles.trustworthy_ai: AI must feel like a helpful assistant, not an absolute authority. Use 'Suggestions' instead of 'Final Marks'.
design_principles.legibility: Large fonts, high contrast, plain language. No technical jargon.
design_principles.cultural_familiarity: Warm, earthy undertones reflecting Indian academic environments (paper textures, academic blues, terracotta warnings).

typography.font_strategy: High legibility, distinct character shapes. Inter is banned.

color_palette.background: bg-stone-50 (warm paper feel, reduces eye strain compared to pure white)

primary.DEFAULT: blue-800 (#1e40af - Academic Blue, trustworthy and authoritative)

layout_and_spacing.interaction_targets: Minimum 48px height for all buttons and inputs (touch-friendly for tablets/phones).

components_strategy.cards: Flat white background, 1px solid border-stone-200, subtle shadow-sm. No floating neon shadows.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-800 text-white hover:bg-blue-900 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-stone-700 border border-stone-300 hover:bg-stone-50 rounded-lg

components_strategy.inputs: Explicit borders (border-stone-300), obvious focus states (ring-2 ring-blue-800). No floating labels.
components_strategy.badges: Soft background (e.g., bg-amber-50) with high-contrast text (text-amber-800) and an icon.
libraries: shadcn/ui (highly customized to remove the default 'Vercel' look, replacing rounded-md with rounded-lg, and using stone colors)

global_navigation.layout: Sticky top header. bg-white border-b border-stone-200.
global_navigation.elements: Brand Logo (Text: 'EvalAssist'), User Avatar, and a prominent Language Toggle (EN | HI | TE).

1_dashboard.kpi_cards: Top row: 3 cards (Total Papers, Pending Review, Avg Score). Large metrics.
1_dashboard.main_action: Massive 'Upload New Assessment' button/card with icon.
1_dashboard.lists: Table of recent assessments with Status badges (Processing, Action Needed, Completed).

2_upload_assessment.dropzone: Large dashed border area (border-2 border-dashed border-stone-300 bg-stone-50 p-12 text-center). Clear instructions: 'Click or drag papers here'.
2_upload_assessment.metadata_form: Simple selects for Class, Subject, and Assessment Type.

3_processing_state.animation: Simple pulsing progress bar or step-by-step checklist (1. Scanning -> 2. Reading Handwriting -> 3. Evaluating). Avoid hyper-futuristic AI loaders.

4_review_and_override_screen.layout: CRITICAL: Split Pane Layout. Left side (Image), Right side (Evaluation logic).
4_review_and_override_screen.left_pane: Sticky/fixed while scrolling right pane. Shows the scanned answer sheet (use mock image). Include basic Zoom In/Out controls.
4_review_and_override_screen.right_pane: Scrollable list of Question Evaluation Cards.

question_card.ai_reasoning: Clear text block explaining why marks were given/deducted.
question_card.override_action: Prominent number input field for the teacher to change the mark. Automatically recalculates total.

4_review_and_override_screen.footer: Sticky bottom bar on right pane: 'Save & Next Paper' button and 'Running Total: X/40'.

5_classroom_insights.visuals: Simple Recharts BarChart for score distribution. List of 'Common Learning Gaps' (e.g., '60% of students struggled with Diagram of Cell').

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against colored backgrounds is at least 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have explicit data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-submit-button', data-testid='mark-override-input-q1').
accessibility_and_testing.language: UI must be built to support dynamic text strings for the EN/HI/TE language switcher.
